zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibilla Vierigk於大約1569年出生在德國薩辛米特勒勒 艾爾茲格比斯可萊斯波波沙奧時，她的父親Kilian Vierigk40歲，母親Mrs. Kilian Vierigk36歲。她於1599年8月1日與Johannes Jemlich結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1632年2月6日在她的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibilla Vierigk于大约1569年出生在德国薩辛米特勒勒 艾爾茲格比斯可萊斯波波沙奧时，她的父亲Kilian Vierigk40岁，母亲Mrs. Kilian Vierigk36岁。她于1599年8月1日与Johannes Jemlich结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1632年2月6日在她的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sibilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sibella
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibilla Vierigk was born about 1569, in Pobershau, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Saxony, Germany, her father, Kilian Vierigk, was 40 and her mother, Mrs. Kilian Vierigk, was 36. She married Johannes Jemlich on 1 August 1599. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 6 February 1632, in her hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibilla Vierigk est née environ 1569, à Pobershau, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Kilian Vierigk, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Kilian Vierigk, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Johannes Jemlich le 1 août 1599. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 février 1632, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibilla Vierigk um 1569 in Pobershau, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Kilian Vierigk 40 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Kilian Vierigk 36. Sie hat am 1. August 1599 Johannes Jemlich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. Februar 1632 im Alter von 64 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibilla Vierigk è nata il circa 1569 nel Pobershau, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Kilian Vierigk, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Kilian Vierigk, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Johannes Jemlich il 1 agosto 1599. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 febbraio 1632, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.Pobershau, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sa: ドイツサチセンミットラーエル エルズジェバーグスクレイスポバーシャウ
ja.Pobershau, Marienberg, Saxony, Germany: ドイツサチセンミットラーエル エルズジェバーグスクレイスポバーシャウ
ja.of Pobershau, Chemnitz, Saxony: ドイツサチセンミットラーエル エルズジェバーグスクレイスポバーシャウ
ja.lifeSummary: Sibilla Vierigkが約1569年にドイツサチセンミットラーエル エルズジェバーグスクレイスポバーシャウで生まれた時，父Kilian Vierigkは40歳，母Mrs. Kilian Vierigkは36歳であった。1599年8月1日にJohannes Jemlichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1632年2月6日に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibilla Vierigk(이)가 대략 1569년 독일 작센 미틀레레어 르즈그비르그스크레이스 포버쇼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Kilian Vierigk(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Kilian Vierigk(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1599년 8월 1일 Johannes Jemlich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1632년 2월 6일 그녀의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibilla Vierigk nasceu aproximadamente 1569, em Pobershau, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Kilian Vierigk, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Kilian Vierigk, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Johannes Jemlich em 1 de agosto de 1599. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1632, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibilla Vierigk родилась около 1569 г. в местности побиршао, миттлирир эрзгебиргскрис, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Kilian Vierigk было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Kilian Vierigk, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johannes Jemlich 1 августа 1599 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 февраля 1632 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibilla Vierigk nació aproximadamente 1569, en Pobershau, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Kilian Vierigk, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mrs. Kilian Vierigk, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Johannes Jemlich el 1 de agosto de 1599. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1632, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
